title: Forming Press
description: Create a forming press to unlock more efficient recipes for all types of brick and charcoal.
body: # Forming Press by Gamemode 4 Adds recipes for more efficient conversion ### Features - Adds a new crafter block to access more efficient recipes - Adds Clay + Netherrack to Nether Brick recipe - Allows Netherrack + Bucket to Lava Bucket recipe More info on what recipes are added can be read on the [Wiki](https://wiki.gm4.co/Forming_Press). ### More Info [ **Watch on Youtube**](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ibtS4zAvglQ) [ **Read the Wiki**](https://wiki.gm4.co/wiki/Forming_Press) ### Credits - Creator: [Bloo](https://bsky.app/profile/bloo.boo) - Updated by: [Misode](https://bsky.app/profile/misode.dev), [BPR](https://bsky.app/profile/bpr02.com), TheEpyonProject - Textures by: [Kyrius](https://bsky.app/profile/kyriuspixels.bsky.social) - Icon Design: [BPR](https://bsky.app/profile/bpr02.com) --- ## About Gamemode 4 Gamemode 4 is a series of command-powered creations that are designed to change and enhance the survival experience. All of our modules are designed to work together flawlessly, and are balanced for usage in a survival setting. Pick and choose your favorites from our [website](https://gm4.co), or wherever you get datapacks.
